title: Apache Airflow Quiz
description: Test your Airflow pipeline orchestration knowledge.

questions.question: What does DAG stand for in Apache Airflow?

options.text: Directed Acyclic Graph — a pipeline with no circular dependencies

questions.question: What is XCom in Airflow used for?

options.text: Cross-cluster communication between different Airflow instances
Passing small amounts of data (metadata, counts) between tasks
Storing large DataFrames in shared memory

questions.question: What does 'catchup=False' do when creating an Airflow DAG?

options.text: Prevents the DAG from running more than once
Disables backfilling — missed runs since start_date are not executed
Catches and ignores all task errors
Stops the DAG from retrying failed tasks
